title: Create: Arms Race
description: Adds Create compatibility and automation recipes to Timeless and Classic Zero (TACZ)
body:
Allows you to automate all items from Timeless and Classic Zero (TACZ) with Create. Adds new materials such as: Steel, Aluminum, and Lead to increase the difficulty of getting weapons. Adds a Research Table which is used to research weapon and ammo schematics (Research Time is configurable). 

Removing regular TACZ recipes
1. Set "DefaultPackDebug" in tacz-common.toml to true
2. Delete all the folders in "config/tacz/custom/tacz_default_gun/tacz/recipes"
